movie.overview: A filmmaker recalls his childhood, when he fell in love with the movies at his village's theater and formed a deep friendship with the theater's projectionist.
movie.tagline: An enchanted village. A wonderful friendship. Star-crossed lovers. And the magic of the movies.
movie.title: Cinema Paradiso

cast.name: Agnese Nano
cast.character: Elena Mendola (teen) / Elena's daughter (in Director's cut)
